description:
About the job
Job Title: Senior Frontend Engineer (React, Next.js, Node.js)
Location: Sydney
Employment Type: Contractor
Duration: 6 months, extendable 
Experience: 7+ years

Job Summary
We are looking for experienced UI Engineers with strong frontend and backend expertise to join our team in Sydney. The ideal candidate will have deep experience in modern JavaScript frameworks, cloud-native deployments, and automated testing, and will be comfortable working in a fast-paced, agile environment.

Key Responsibilities
Design, develop, and maintain high-quality user interfaces using Next.js and React.js.
Build and support backend services using Node.js and GraphQL.
Implement scalable and maintainable frontend architectures using TypeScript and JavaScript.
Work with feature flagging tools such as LaunchDarkly to enable controlled feature rollouts.
Develop and maintain CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions.
Manage secure application configurations using Vault and certificate management solutions.
Deploy and maintain applications on AWS (S3, CloudFront).
Containerize and orchestrate applications using Docker and Kubernetes.
Write and maintain unit, integration, and automated UI tests to ensure application quality.
Collaborate closely with product managers, designers, and other engineers to deliver high-quality solutions.

Required Skills & Experience
7+ years of experience in frontend development using Next.js and React.js.
Strong proficiency in TypeScript and JavaScript.
Hands-on experience with Node.js and GraphQL.
Experience with feature flagging tools (LaunchDarkly preferred).
Strong understanding of CI/CD pipelines, preferably using GitHub Actions.
Experience with AWS services such as S3 and CloudFront.
Solid experience with Docker and Kubernetes.
Strong background in automated testing (unit, integration, and UI testing).

Nice to Have
Experience working in large-scale, cloud-native environments.
Strong understanding of security best practices in frontend and backend development.
Excellent communication and stakeholder collaboration skills.
